content:
📜 2. Leadership Challenges – Implementing a Cooldown Period

📜 Faction leadership can only be challenged every few weeks.

✔ Leadership Challenge Rules:
• Leadership challenges cannot occur more than once every four weeks.
• A leader must defend their position through skill checks, debates, or trials.
• If a faction overthrows a leader too often, they may suffer a stability penalty.

✔ Cooldown Effects:
• A faction that maintains stable leadership gains a small bonus to faction-wide actions.
• A faction that keeps changing leaders may attract a random chaos event.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents non-stop leadership battles.
✔ Encourages strategic timing for overthrow attempts.
✔ Adds depth to faction decision-making.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 498 (chunk 498/555)
